title: $display format strings doesn't support unknown and high-impedance values

features.name: $display with %d format and 4-state value causes internal error
features.description: Code should include a $display system task using %d format specifier with a 4-state (x or z) literal value

features.name: $display with %h format and 4-state value displays wrong output
features.description: Code should include a $display system task using %h format specifier with a 4-state value containing x or z bits

features.name: $display with %o format and 4-state value displays wrong output
features.description: Code should include a $display system task using %o format specifier with a 4-state value containing x or z bits
